title: The Ancient Shandia Village
description: The story returns from Noland and Calgara’s past to the present fight, where the golden bell must finally answer the old promise.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villagers. The story returns from Noland and Calgara’s past to the present fight, where the golden bell must finally answer the old promise.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: In a certain Kingdom in North Blue,

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: There lived a man named Mont@anc Nolandd.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: It was back when I was still-

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: One day, upon returning from another voyage,

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Nolandd reported to the King thus:

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Tell us more of your stories!

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: I humbly accept the post, your majesty...

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Iceburg up ahead! The rudder won't move!

dialogue.speaker: Noland
dialogue.text: Are we still not there yet!?

summary: The story returns from Noland and Calgara’s past to the present fight, where the golden bell must finally answer the old promise.
